name: wilson-minimal-keep
description: Keep declarative agent-context files lean — a PreToolUse(Write|Edit|MultiEdit) guard on AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md plus every declarative `*.tape` (AGENTS.tape, identity.tape, <DOMAIN>.tape per tape v1.2 line 189). 0.7.0 expanded scope from fixed-basename only to all declarative `*.tape`; event-stream tapes (`<sid>.tape` under sessions/, `<DOMAIN>.log.tape`, `*.history.tape`, `recap/index.tape`, `<PROJ>::<DOMAIN>.tape`) are append-only and unbounded by design, so the guard exempts them. Four bloat signals. S1/S2/S3 are file-level (calibrated against 164 unique-content master AGENTS.* under ~/core on 2026-05-20 with /.claude/worktrees/ duplicates excluded; the three caps target the same top-decile bloat tail so fire rates stay aligned ~6-10%): S1 total-lines (file over 280 lines ≈ p90, Write only — fires ~10%), S2 long-line (any single line over 500 chars — sits between p90 375 and p95 565, dropped in 0.4.0 from 800 which only fired on p99 outliers at 3%, splitting jammed prose where a paragraph has been collapsed onto one line — fires ~6%), S3 history (a Log/History/Changelog heading or 3+ dated bullets — append-only history belongs in a REGISTRY.md or GROWTH.md, not in the per-session context file — fires ~10%). S4 (added 0.6.0) is per-tape-entry, fires only on content carrying `@<TYPE>` headers: enforces the `.tape` v1.2 Compactness invariants (~/core/tape/spec/tape.md 2026-05-20 amendment) — per-entry total ≤ 500 chars, field values 1 line (heredoc banned in declarative tapes), ≤ 5 fields per entry. Two modes via SIDECAR_MINIMAL_KEEP_MODE: `block` (DEFAULT since 0.2.0 — the Write is DENIED) / `warn` (one-line advisory, write proceeds). EXCLUDE list covers archive / vendor / node_modules / .venv / scratch / templates / examples / .git AND `/.claude/worktrees/` (isolated-agent worktrees carry duplicate AGENTS.* copies of the master). Pairs with wilson-tree: when it flags a history section it routes it to the repo's REGISTRY.md (wilson-tree's index artifact) if present. Audit verb: `bin/minimal-keep.sh scan [dir]`. Opt out: SIDECAR_NO_MINIMAL_KEEP=1.
